title: Logistics Officer - KT
description:
Basic Salary + AWS + VB
Nearest MRT: Tanjong Pagar


We are seeking a dedicated Logistics Coordinator to manage end-to-end shipping processes, including documentation, freight troubleshooting, and forwarder coordination to ensure optimal delivery performance. The ideal candidate will bring 3-5 years of experience in logistics operations and demonstrate a proactive approach to supporting customer requirements and monthly reporting within a dynamic team environment.

Job Description:

  • Provide relevant data and analysis to the sales team throughout the shipping process

  • Prepare necessary documents as needed for all customers for customs clearance

  • Responsible for troubleshooting any concerns related to freight transportation

  • Work with existing transportation forwarders on optimal delivery rate and routing

  • Responsible for planning and tracking the shipment of products according to customers’ requirements

  • Responsible for the preparation of appropriate and accurate shipping documents for all necessary shipments

  • Monitor shipments and ensure customer satisfaction

  • Responsible for maintaining accurate logs of all transportation goods in the monthly shipping schedule

  • Performing other ad-hoc administrative or operational duties as assigned by the Management from time to time

  • Undertaking any other duties or responsibilities assigned by the Company that are reasonably within your job scope

  • Other ad hoc duties assigned by Management.

Job Requirement:

  • Diploma or degree holder (Logistics-related background preferred, but not mandatory)

  • 3-5 years of experience in logistics operations

  • Able to work independently, responsibly, and be a good team player

  • Willing to support overtime when needed (Overtime pay provided, up to 15 hours per month)

  • Positive, open and optimistic personality

  • Able to communicate in Mandarin will be a plus to communicate with Mandarin-speaking clients.

  • Able to communicate in the Japanese language will be a plus to communicate with Japanese-speaking clients.


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Other applications will be updated to our database for future job opportunities.

By submitting any resumes or applications to Pasona Singapore Pte Ltd, you are considered to have read and agreed on the terms of our Privacy Policy, and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, disclosing your personal information to the prospective employers for their consideration.

Effective from 1 October 2020 under the new Employment Agencies (EAs) Licence Conditions,

EAs will be required to collect the personal data (e.g. NRIC number for overseas candidates) of applicants referred to employers for permanent or contract job positions of at least six months with a fixed monthly salary of S$3,300 and above.

PDPA requirements on collection, use, and disclosure of personal data would not be applicable to EAs that are collecting such information as it is a regulatory requirement by Ministry of Manpower.

― Who Are We? ―
Pasona Singapore Pte. Ltd., a wholly-owned subsidiary of Pasona Inc. (Japan), was established in 1984, a leading Japan-based recruitment firm in Singapore with experience over 35 years. We have a strong network of 15 countries and 59 other overseas branches across the world (as of July, 2020) and provide not only placement services but also deliver various types of HR-related services in high quality.


― For Job Seekers ―
Pasona’s goal is to introduce jobs where our candidates can make use of their skills and experiences. We will support you through career consultation, introducing suitable jobs and until your first working day.

Please register with us online which enables you to apply for current opening jobs and receive new vacancies if you are suitable candidates.

Do visit Pasona Singapore's website for more information and other job opportunities.http://www.pasona.com.sg
